_note: Frozen baseline for eval/golden.demo.jsonl: repo self-indexed, pure hybrid (RAG_RERANK_AUTO=off), RAG_CHUNK_CONTEXT_PREFIX=on (default). Golden set expanded from 17 to 23 cases (+6 paraphrase cases targeting pack.py, run.py, langchain_retriever.py, mcp_server.py, retrieval.py auto-rerank trigger, and a second chunkers.py angle). Stage 3 chunk-prefix ablation on 23-case set: WITH prefix beats WITHOUT by +0.017 MRR / +0.044 Hit@1 but regresses Hit@5 by -0.044. The regression is driven by the chunkers.py second-angle paraphrase (rank 5 WITHOUT prefix, MISS WITH prefix — the prefix context causes build.py to outscore it in the dense channel). Hit@5 is the gated headline; re-freeze when it moves beyond ±5pp from 0.913.
